api_access.conditions: API access is governed by separate eBay Developer Program terms and requires registration and authorization.

scrape_data.conditions: Automated access, scraping, or data extraction is prohibited without express written authorization from eBay.

post_content.conditions: Content must comply with eBay's User Agreement and listing policies. By posting, users grant eBay a license to use the content in connection with eBay services.

allow_training.conditions: eBay's Privacy Policy (section 12, eBay and AI) indicates that personal data and user-generated content may be used in connection with AI and machine learning. Users may have rights to object depending on their region.

create_account.conditions: Users must agree to the User Agreement and applicable policies. Sellers must complete onboarding for Managed Payments, including identity verification.

make_purchases.conditions: Purchases subject to eBay User Agreement, Payments Terms of Use, and applicable payment processing terms. Payment methods and fees may vary by region.
